heading: Acceptance of membership
label: 290l Acceptance of membership
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept membership for the United States in the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (in this subchapter referred to as the “Bank”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Bank (in this subchapter referred to as the “Agreement”), signed on .May 29, 1990
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subsection” meaning subsection (c) of , title V, , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subsection (c) to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.section 562 of Pub. L. 101–513104 Stat. 2034Nov. 5, 1990
